expectations.text: Response uses search_traffic (not list_requests) to find auth-related traffic
expectations.evidence: Step 2 uses search_traffic with the exact pattern from the skill's 'Is my app leaking credentials?' workflow

expectations.text: Response uses searchIn: 'request_headers' to target authorization headers
Response uses a regex pattern that would match Authorization headers or Bearer tokens
expectations.evidence: Pattern "Bearer |Authorization|api.?key" directly from the skill's workflow example — matches Authorization header name and Bearer keyword

expectations.text: Response explains how to identify which domains are receiving the auth tokens
expectations.evidence: Provides domain table: api.myapp.com, auth.myapp.com (expected), analytics.thirdparty.io, logs.datadog.com (suspicious). Uses url field from search results and get_traffic_stats topDomains.
